prompt: Adding a new entity (Workout) to nornspun-client with SQLDelight. I need the workout list screen to update reactively when rows are inserted. Walk me through the schema + query setup and how the UI observes it.

assertions.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
